# Contributing

<!-- Generated by seed-golden-context | Last updated: 2026-05-07 -->

## Prerequisites

| Tool | Version | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Node.js | 22 (used in CI) | No `.nvmrc` present; CI uses Node 22 |
| npm | Bundled with Node | `ignore-scripts=true` is set in `.npmrc` |

## Getting Started

```bash
# Clone and install
git clone git@github.com:contentful/contentful-resolve-response.git
cd contentful-resolve-response
npm ci                    # source: CI workflow ‚Üí build.yaml

# Build
npm run build             # source: package.json ‚Üí scripts.build

# Run tests
npm test                  # source: package.json ‚Üí scripts.test
```

## Development Workflow

```bash
# Watch mode for tests during development
npm run test-watch        # source: package.json ‚Üí scripts.test-watch
```

The library is a single file (`index.js`) with a straightforward edit-test loop. Make changes to `index.js`, run tests, and verify linting before committing.

## Commands

### Build

```bash
npm run build             # source: package.json ‚Üí scripts.build
# Runs Babel with CJS and ESM targets ‚Üí outputs to dist/cjs/ and dist/esm/
```

### Test

```bash
npm test                  # source: package.json ‚Üí scripts.test
# Runs Mocha with babel-register for ES module support
npm run test-watch        # source: package.json ‚Üí scripts.test-watch
```

### Lint & Format

```bash
npm run lint              # source: package.json ‚Üí scripts.lint
# ESLint on index.js and test/
npm run format:check      # source: package.json ‚Üí scripts.format:check
# Prettier check on all JS/TS/JSON files
npm run format:fix        # source: package.json ‚Üí scripts.format:fix
# Prettier auto-fix
```

## Testing

- **Framework:** Mocha + Chai (with `dirty-chai` for function-style assertions)
- **Location:** `test/unit/`
- **Run all:** `npm test`
- **Run single:** `npx mocha --require babel-register 'test/unit/<file>'`
- **Watch mode:** `npm run test-watch`
- **Fixture data:** `test/unit/real-response.json` contains a production-like CDA response
- **Immutability testing:** `test/unit/deep-freeze.js` helper ensures the library does not mutate input

## Code Style & Conventions

- **Prettier** ‚Äî configured in `.prettierrc`: 120 char width, no semicolons, single quotes
- **ESLint** ‚Äî flat config in `eslint.config.mjs`: `@eslint/js` recommended + `eslint-plugin-mocha`
- **EditorConfig** ‚Äî `.editorconfig`: 2-space indent for JS files
- **Pre-commit hook** ‚Äî Husky runs `lint-staged` (Prettier + ESLint auto-fix on staged files)

## Commit Convention

This repo uses [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) enforced by `commitlint` with `@commitlint/config-conventional`:

```
type(scope): description
```

Valid types: `feat`, `fix`, `chore`, `docs`, `refactor`, `test`, `perf`, `ci`, `build`, `revert`

Examples:
```
feat: resolve resource links across spaces
fix: handle missing sys property in includes
build(deps): bump fast-copy from 2.x to 3.x
chore: update CI workflow
```

**Note:** `build(deps)` commits with scope `deps` trigger a patch release via semantic-release configuration.

## Branch Strategy

- `master` ‚Äî production branch; all releases cut from here
- `beta` ‚Äî pre-release channel (`npm install contentful-resolve-response@beta`)
- `dev` ‚Äî dev pre-release channel (`npm install contentful-resolve-response@dev`)
- Feature branches ‚Äî any naming convention, merged to `master` via PR

## Release Process

Releases are fully automated via **semantic-release** on push to `master`, `beta`, or `dev`:

1. Push/merge to `master` triggers the release workflow
2. `semantic-release` analyzes commit messages to determine version bump
3. Generates changelog via `@semantic-release/changelog`
4. Commits changelog + version updates via `@semantic-release/git`
5. Publishes to npm via `@semantic-release/npm`
6. Creates GitHub release via `@semantic-release/github`

**Release rules:**
- `feat:` ‚Üí minor version bump
- `fix:` ‚Üí patch version bump
- `build(deps):` ‚Üí patch version bump (custom rule)
- `chore:` ‚Üí no release

## Pull Requests

- PR title should follow conventional commit format
- Required checks: build, lint, format, tests (all in CI)
- All code owned by `@contentful/team-developer-experience` (see `CODEOWNERS`)
- Dependabot PRs are auto-approved and merged when checks pass

## CI/CD

| Job | Trigger | What it does |
|---|---|---|
| Build | Push/PR to any branch | `npm ci` + `npm run build`, caches `dist/` |
| Check | After Build | Lint + format check + tests |
| Release | Push to master/beta/dev | semantic-release (changelog, npm publish, GitHub release) |
| CodeQL | Scheduled + push | Security analysis via GitHub CodeQL |
| Dependabot auto-merge | Dependabot PRs | Auto-approves and requests merge for dependency bumps |

## File-Level Guidance

| Path | Notes |
|---|---|
| `index.js` | The entire library implementation. Single source of truth for resolution logic. |
| `dist/` | Generated build output. Never edit manually; always regenerated by `npm run build`. |
| `CHANGELOG.md` | Auto-generated by semantic-release. Do not edit manually. |
| `package-lock.json` | Lockfile. Committed but auto-managed by npm/Dependabot. |
